headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 18, 2026**
article:
The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 6-3 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Drew Rasmussen earning the win. Junior Caminero led the Marlins' offense with a home run and 2 RBIs. The Baltimore Orioles dominated the Washington Nationals, securing a 7-3 victory with Gunnar Henderson leading the charge at the plate. Henderson's impressive performance included four hits, one home run, and two RBIs. The Philadelphia Phillies shut out the Pittsburgh Pirates 6-0, with Zack Wheeler pitching 7.0 innings with 8 strikeouts and no earned runs.

Several players have been placed on the injured list, affecting their teams' lineups. Brendan Donovan, a third baseman for the Seattle Mariners, has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left groin muscle strain. Jack Dreyer, a left-handed pitcher for the Los Angeles Dodgers, has been placed on the 15-day injured list with left shoulder discomfort. Other players on the injured list include Hunter Harvey (Chicago Cubs), Ty Madden (Detroit Tigers), Ryan O'Hearn (Pittsburgh Pirates), Jose Trevino (Cincinnati Reds), Tommy Nance (Toronto Blue Jays), and Jake Fraley (Tampa Bay Rays).

Several trades and roster movements have taken place. The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired left-handed pitcher Eric Lauer from the Toronto Blue Jays in a trade for cash considerations. The Chicago White Sox acquired center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. The Athletics also traded right-handed pitcher Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates for second baseman Alika Williams and traded right-handed pitcher Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Marlins 6-3**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 3-6 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Drew Rasmussen earning the win. Junior Caminero led the Marlins' offense with a home run and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Nationals 7-3**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 7-3 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Gunnar Henderson leading the charge at the plate. Henderson's impressive performance included four hits, one home run, and two RBIs.

top_news.title: **Phillies Shut Out Pirates 6-0**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies dominated the Pittsburgh Pirates, securing a 6-0 victory. Zack Wheeler led the way for the Phillies, pitching 7.0 innings with 8 strikeouts and no earned runs.

top_news.title: **Braves Rout Red Sox 8-1**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves dominated the Boston Red Sox, securing an 8-1 victory. Grant Holmes led the Braves' pitching effort, throwing 6.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Mariners Place Donovan on Injured List**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners have placed third baseman Brendan Donovan on the 10-day injured list due to a left groin muscle strain, effective retroactive to May 16, 2026. Donovan's status on the injured list will be reassessed after 10 days.

top_news.title: **Lauer Joins Dodgers Roster**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers have acquired left-handed pitcher Eric Lauer in a trade with the Toronto Blue Jays. The trade was made for cash considerations.
